summary: First test run for Arabic RTL inspection app. All 22 backend pytest tests PASSED (100%) covering auth, users, machines, questions, inspections, CSV/PDF export, stats, RBAC. Frontend smoke test passed: login (admin+tech), all 5 admin tabs clickable, tech dashboard renders questions/machines selector, RTL Arabic UI rendering correct.

issues: Native browser date input (mm/dd/yyyy LTR) used instead of a styled RTL date picker; works functionally but breaks the otherwise consistent Arabic RTL aesthetic

action_items: (Optional) Replace native date inputs in admin Inspections filter with a localized/RTL-friendly date picker for visual consistency
critical_code_review_comments: Route ordering in server.py: /inspections/{iid} is declared before /inspections/export/csv. FastAPI matched correctly during tests (CSV export returned 200 with BOM), but defining the static path /inspections/export/csv BEFORE the parameterized /inspections/{iid} is the safer convention to avoid future regressions.
verify_password swallows all exceptions (returns False) — fine, but logging the exception would help debugging bcrypt hash issues.
PDF export contains Latin text only; Arabic question text is omitted/replaced — acceptable per problem statement but should be highlighted to user.

CORS_ORIGINS='*' combined with allow_credentials=True is technically invalid per CORS spec; browsers may block credentialed requests in stricter setups. Fine for preview but should be tightened for production.
seed_data_creation: Tests created TEST-prefixed machine/user/question/inspection and cleaned them up via fixtures.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py — 22 tests covering full surface incl. RBAC, CSV BOM, PDF magic bytes, stats. Frontend uses data-testid for login fields and Arabic visible text for tabs (المكائن/الأسئلة/المستخدمون/الفحوصات/نظرة عامة). Auth uses Bearer token from localStorage + httpOnly cookie.
